sources.title: EU Ecolabel Product Catalogue — Lubricants
sources.notes: Еврокомиссия прямо предоставляет CSV/API для повторного использования публичных данных ECAT. Хэш рассчитан по нормализованным строкам API; ECAT предупреждает, что каталог неполон, поскольку регистрацию выполняют держатели лицензий.

sources.title: Nordic Swan product search — EU Ecolabel Lubricating Grease cross-check
sources.notes: The official page explicitly exports 60 product rows as CSV. All 60 are labelled EU Ecolabel / EU27 Lubricants. Licence-number reconciliation shows that they are a subset of the 878 ECAT rows already ingested; 12 apparent name differences are punctuation, token-order or package-format variants under licence SE/027/003. The export is therefore retained as independent coverage evidence and does not inflate the canonical product count.

sources.title: USDA BioPreferred Program Catalog
sources.notes: Публичный интерфейс USDA возвращает полные категории без пагинации. Сохранены product ID, name, company, категории и program flags; рекламные описания не переиздаются, хранится только SHA-256 для доказательства. 1 387 вхождений категорий объединены в 892 продукта по USDA product ID.

sources.title: ZF Lists of Lubricants TE-ML
sources.notes: Официальный ZIP ZF от 01.07.2026 содержит 28 PDF и 4 919 вхождений одобрений. Они объединены по 1 498 уникальным ZF approval numbers; сохранены TE-ML sheet, lubricant class, page и хэши PDF, но оформление и полный текст PDF не переиздаются. SHA-256 архива: ad8bf0de338d9d18e956bcb6215d81dd578a08e72291c7565b3f5df73d911b11.

sources.title: Allison Transmission Approved Fluids
sources.notes: Шесть официальных списков TES содержат 104 продукта и 119 вхождений номеров одобрения (117 уникальных). Сохранены marketer/brand, product name, TES specification, approval numbers, page, дата списка, URL и хэши PDF; оформление и полный текст PDF не переиздаются.

sources.title: Driventic DIWA Approved Oil Lists
sources.notes: Четыре списка масел для DIWA с интервалами замены 60 000, 120 000, 180 000 и 240 000 км содержат 226 продуктов. Это текущие старшие версии, опубликованные на официальной странице Driventic; даты самих списков 17.01.2022, 06.03.2025 и 20.08.2025 сохранены без подмены датой страницы.

sources.title: Mercedes-Benz Trucks Operating Fluids DTFR
sources.notes: 63 продуктовых листа DTFR дали 2 102 вхождения одобрений и 1 892 уникальных внутренних product ID. Обзорные листы и листы, которые прямо отсылают к допускам другого OEM, исключены. 38 продуктов встречаются только в явно исторических листах и сохранены с историческим lifecycle.

sources.title: Mercedes-Benz Operating Fluids BeVo
sources.notes: 130 листов проверены, 92 содержат продукты. 2 461 вхождение допусков объединено в 1 913 продуктов по нормализованным company + product name + family; сохранены source UUID, внутренние product ID, листы и даты. Коллизия product ID FDKAI7 у двух компаний сохранена явно; 43 продукта имеют только historical-допуски.

sources.title: Volvo Genuine Lubricants, Greases and Coolants
sources.notes: Пять официальных страниц Volvo CE и Volvo Trucks дали 32 конкретных продукта: масла, трансмиссионные и гидравлические жидкости, смазки и охлаждающие жидкости. Сохранены классы, применения, температуры, упаковки и номера деталей; три названия серий VDS без конкретной вязкости исключены, поскольку серия не является товаром-градацией.

sources.title: MAN Maintenance and Service Product Recommendations for Trucks
sources.notes: Официальная 150-страничная рекомендация MAN, выпуск апрель 2026: 32 конкретных масла, смазки, ОЖ и технические жидкости / 33 вхождения. Стандарты без коммерческого продукта, общие ISO VG-классы и серия Chevron без конкретной градации исключены. Статус строки означает текущую рекомендацию или предписание MAN для узла применения, но не подменяется утверждением о наличии отдельного формального approval letter.

sources.title: LIQUI MOLY official English product catalog 2020
sources.notes: Официальный 204-страничный англоязычный каталог создан 23.04.2020. Из 72 релевантных страниц получено 419 продуктов, 1 482 уникальных part number и 413 продуктов с фасовочными строками. Текущий lifecycle не предполагается: каждая позиция помечена historical_catalog_current_status_unverified.

sources.title: LIQUI MOLY current GB/English public OpenAPI catalog
sources.notes: Официальная XML-карта содержит 759 master-product URL; публичный OpenAPI разрешил 742. В профессиональный scope вошли 447 масел, смазок, присадок, ОЖ и технических жидкостей с 985 article SKU. Ещё 17 sitemap-записей не разрешились API и оказались торговым оборудованием/материалами. Lifecycle 2020→2026 строится отдельно: отсутствие в британском текущем каталоге не объявляется снятием с производства.

sources.title: FUCHS India Product Finder
sources.notes: Официальная страница содержит 1 115 source rows в одном JSON. После исключения 94 строк серий и 6 единиц оборудования, а также объединения 8 повторных source-вхождений получено 1 007 конкретных товарных строк. Публикуются только факты, допуски, рекомендации, классификация, UID/URL и хэши; маркетинговые описания не копируются. Imprint ограничивает коммерческое копирование документации, поэтому этот factual-only scope обязателен.

Совпадения с FUCHS India объединяются только по точному нормализованному названию и профессиональному семейству; межрыночные конфликты семейства остаются раздельными.

sources.title: API EOLCS Licensee Directory
sources.notes: Live public directory count observed 2026-07-21: 35,174 licensed product rows and 883 licensee companies. API states that the directory covers active licensees and products and is updated frequently. sources.title: Idemitsu Global Lubricants Product List
sources.notes: Official Website Usage Guidelines state that Idemitsu owns the site content and strictly prohibits use, reproduction, modification, transfer or duplication in whole or part beyond uses explicitly permitted by law without prior written consent. Сохранены регистрация, держатель, производитель, назначение, SAE/ISO/NLGI, уровень свойств, состав и фасовки; narrative OBS не переиздаётся.

Наблюдение доказывает исторический отбор образца, но не текущую регистрацию или доступность. PDF-only выпуски до октября 2017 остаются отдельным backlog; полные таблицы 2024 подключены отдельным источником.

sources.title: ANP Brazil Lubricant Monitoring Complete PDF Tables 2024
sources.owner: Agência Nacional do Petróleo, Gás Natural e Biocombustíveis
sources.notes: Полные координатно извлечённые таблицы продуктов из двух моторных бюллетеней PML 2024 и панорамы трансмиссионных масел 2024: 1 425 опубликованных наблюдений и 693 профессиональные product-grade identity. Моторные таблицы точно сходятся с заявленными 782 + 462 образцами; трансмиссионный отчёт заявляет 190, но публикует 181 строку, поэтому девять строк не выдуманы. CNPJ, продавцы и места отбора исключены.

sources.title: ANP Brazil Lubricant Monitoring Nonconforming Product PDF Appendices 2007-2017
sources.owner: Agência Nacional do Petróleo, Gás Natural e Biocombustíveis
sources.notes: 73 официальных PDF-выпуска 2007-2017 годов дали 4 837 исторических наблюдений и 5 612 появлений проб в приложениях о несоответствии регистрации, маркировки или качества. Это только опубликованные исключения, не полная совокупность отобранных проб. CNPJ, продавцы, адреса и места отбора исключены; сокращённые и физически разорванные номера CPT восстановлены только из контекста года и геометрии той же PDF-ячейки с явной пометкой метода.

sources.title: Thailand DOEB Motor Lubricant Registration Registry
sources.notes: Последний доступный полный snapshot за март 2024 содержит 6 213 регистрационных строк моторных масел и 6 210 уникальных номеров. Точное совпадение держателя, продукта, SAE и полного набора стандартов объединяет 727 повторных регистрационных вхождений в 5 486 product identities с сохранением всех номеров и строк. Три номера конфликтуют между шестью продуктами и сохранены раздельно. Статус срока действия вычислен по опубликованной дате и не представлен как live-подтверждение. Dataset классифицирован как public и лицензирован Open Data Common.

sources.title: Indonesia General List of Lubricants (NPT) 2021-2025
sources.owner: Directorate General of Oil and Gas, Ministry of Energy and Mineral Resources of Indonesia
sources.notes: Официальный перечень NPT на 211 страницах, опубликованный в разделе Informasi Publik. Сохранены только факты таблицы: компания, продукт, NPT, срок, страница и вычисленные технические признаки. 12 575 строк содержат NPT; 51 строка с CEK INPUTAN DATA сохранена с явным флагом ошибки источника. Статус по сроку — вычисленная оценка, не результат live-проверки.

sources.title: DEUTZ DQC Oil and Coolant Release Lists
sources.notes: Официальная страница публикует списки масел и охлаждающих жидкостей DQC выпуска 07/2026, но copyright notice разрешает копирование материалов только без изменений и не для коммерческих целей. Массовая нормализация отложена до письменного разрешения.

sources.title: Klüber Lubrication Product Catalog
sources.owner: Klüber Lubrication München GmbH & Co. KG
sources.notes: Terms of Use прямо запрещают data mining, robots, scraper и offline reader. Автоматическая выгрузка не выполняется.

sources.title: Petro-Canada Lubricants Product Catalog
sources.notes: Условия сайта запрещают screen scraping без явного разрешения. Нужен официальный feed или письменное разрешение.

sources.title: Motul Product Catalog
sources.notes: Корпоративное раскрытие сообщает более 19 000 активных references и более 400 formulations; это не нормализованные продуктовые строки. Условия ограничивают копирование и воспроизведение материалов, поэтому массовый импорт каталога не выполняется без разрешения.

sources.title: NSF White Book Nonfood Compounds Listing Directory
sources.notes: Public search exposes current food-grade lubricant registrations, but NSF terms explicitly prohibit data extraction and data mining without prior written permission. No rows are bulk-ingested; an official feed or permission is required.

sources.title: Blue Angel DE-UZ 178 Biodegradable Lubricants and Hydraulic Fluids
sources.notes: Официальная страница DE-UZ 178 показывает 149 product cards и прямо предлагает XLS-Datei. 149 export-строк нормализованы в 148 identities manufacturer + product; одна точная дублирующая identity объединена с сохранением обеих product-page ссылок. Семь официальных категорий дали 159 category occurrences. Адреса, телефоны, email, изображения и маркетинговые описания не переносятся.

sources.title: Korea Eco-Label certification records — EL611 Lubricants
sources.notes: The 2026-01-31 official CSV contains 240,695 observed data rows although portal metadata reports 99,602. Exact category EL611 selects 21 lubricant rows, normalized to 20 product identities after merging one 20-Liter package occurrence. Business registration numbers, locations and factory identifiers are excluded.

sources.title: Korea Eco-Label certification records — EL509 Vehicle Glass Washer Fluids
sources.notes: Exact category EL509 selects 11 vehicle glass washer fluid rows, normalized to nine product identities after merging two pairs of 1.5 L/1.8 L model-package occurrences. Business registration numbers, locations and factory identifiers are excluded.

sources.title: UAE MOIAT Product Conformity Data — Lubricants and Technical Fluids
sources.owner: United Arab Emirates Ministry of Industry and Advanced Technology (MOIAT)
sources.notes: 131 listing pages yielded 1,236 certificate cards and 3,176 product-certificate occurrences across selected lubricant, engine-oil, ATF, brake-fluid and AdBlue types. Explicit 250/500 ml and 1/4/5/20/208 L suffixes are separated from formula/model identity; renewals and duplicate ECAS/EQM occurrences are merged with every certificate retained. 1,840 normalized products remain, including 111 with a certificate active at the 2026-07-21 snapshot; 183 generic-code identities remain in review family S. The official Open Data page explicitly permits free use, reuse, distribution and sharing without restrictions.

sources.title: EAEU conformity-document register — Lubricants and Technical Fluids
sources.notes: A complete indexed exact-code crawl covered 81,076 unique conformity documents across 17 audited ten-digit TN VED codes. Strict product-level filtering retained 51,768 occurrences and normalized them to 38,444 manufacturer/holder + reported designation + family identities; 13,324 repeated certificate occurrences were merged with all evidence and direct official card links retained. Generic assortment declarations and non-product text were excluded. Only 2,943 rows contain an explicitly parsed trademark; the remaining 35,501 use the source manufacturer/holder as a clearly flagged fallback and must not be interpreted as independently verified brands. The register proves conformity-document evidence, not current market availability or formula equivalence.

sources.title: US EPA Safer Choice and Design for the Environment — explicit lubricant products
sources.notes: The official 4,786-row bulk CSV contains 12 occurrences whose product name explicitly contains the standalone word lubricant. UPC/GTIN/MPN repetitions are merged into two medical-instrument lubricant products from two companies. Degreasers, grease-trap cleaners and unrelated oils are excluded; city and state are not republished.

sources.title: US EPA ChemExpo / CPDat — lubricant and technical-fluid products
sources.notes: CPDat 4.1 is published under CC0 and ChemExpo exposes direct product cards plus downloadable PUC metadata and bulk composition data. Exact lubricant, hydraulic-fluid, metalworking-fluid, motor-oil, antifreeze, deicer and anti-seize PUCs are retained; broader automotive, marine, windshield, clipper, aviation and industrial mold-release categories use explicit inclusion and false-positive exclusion rules. The mold-release audit reviewed all 323 source occurrences, retained 233 explicit or manually classified release/lubricant products and excluded 90 obvious or unsupported automatic assignments. Package-only suffixes and repeated EPA product records are merged while every retained source product ID remains linked. CPDat mixes historical and current public documents, EPA states that the compiled data are not reviewed by EPA, and current market availability is therefore never inferred.

sources.title: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority — engine-oil CM licences
sources.owner: Pakistan Standards and Quality Control Authority (PSQCA)
sources.notes: Two exact product filters for PS 343 mono-grade and multi-grade internal-combustion engine lubricating oil expose 14 licence/brand scopes. One licence is valid and 13 are expired at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. The source grain is a certified brand scope, not an individual SAE/API formulation; SAE/API are therefore never inferred. Locations, contacts and addresses are excluded.

sources.title: Philippine Bureau of Product Standards — PS motor-vehicle brake-fluid licensees
sources.owner: Philippines Department of Trade and Industry — Bureau of Philippine Standards
sources.notes: The official BPS List of Certified Products page directly links a live PS-licensee spreadsheet. Its 2026-05-31 snapshot contains 3,558 rows; 13 exact Motor Vehicle Brake Fluid licences normalize to 89 licence + brand/product-label + DOT scopes. Audited per-licence mappings avoid assigning every brand to every grade. Region and contacts are excluded; one source conflict between Brand Name and Model/Type remains explicitly flagged.

sources.title: Philippine Bureau of Product Standards — ICC motor-vehicle brake-fluid certificate holders
sources.owner: Philippines Department of Trade and Industry — Bureau of Philippine Standards
sources.notes: The official BPS page directly links a live ICC-holder spreadsheet. Its 2026-04-30 snapshot contains 19,461 rows; 114 exact Motor Vehicle Brake Fluid rows expand to 129 class occurrences and normalize to 34 holder + product-label + brake-fluid-class identities after repeated ICC sticker ranges are merged. One false ceramic-tile row containing brake-fluid text is excluded. Category typos, inconsistent standards and tyre-like type values remain explicit quality flags. ICC evidence is not treated as a current commercial offer.

sources.title: Ghana Standards Authority — certified lubricant and coolant products, January-September 2025
sources.notes: The official 112-page decision register contains 16 exact professional-scope rows: 13 engine oils, two gear oils and one radiator coolant. Product/brand, holder, SAE, API where stated, certified standard, product licence, issue/expiry dates, PDF page index and printed item number are retained. One January licence had expired by the catalog snapshot; 15 remained within the published validity period. The audited transcription is pinned to the official PDF SHA-256 and creates no commercial offer or price observation.

sources.title: Flender T7300 approved lubricants
sources.notes: Official T7300 approval pages are publicly viewable, but Flender Terms of Use prohibit copying, reproducing or exploiting website content without prior written consent. No approval rows are imported.

sources.title: Kenya Bureau of Standards — S-Mark lubricant and technical-fluid products
sources.notes: The public directory reported 42,358 S-Marks at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. Twenty-five broad and professional search slices exposed 4,276 visible cards; 4,271 cards parsed to 2,897 unique permits. A strict lubricant/technical-fluid scope retained 775 permits and merged 25 renewal or duplicate permits into 750 product identities from 64 manufacturers. Only factual product, brand, company, permit lifecycle and standard designation/title evidence is retained; addresses, contacts and Kenya Standard body text are excluded. Search totals and visible-card counts are reported separately because KEBS pagination does not render every result counted by its backend.

sources.title: Uganda National Bureau of Standards — certified lubricant products
sources.notes: The public UNBS register exposed 13,091 certification rows at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. Exact professional product types retained 47 lubricant/brake-fluid permit occurrences, normalized to 46 product identities after one historical permit renewal merge. The UNBS certification agreement states that permit particulars are entered in a public directory/register. Only company, marketed product designation, product type, permit lifecycle and standard designation are retained; district/location, contacts and standard body text are excluded.

sources.title: Tanzania Bureau of Standards — certified lubricant products
sources.notes: The public TBS register exposed 2,642 certification rows at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. Seventy exact lubricant/coolant/brake-fluid certificate rows contain 184 comma-separated marketed product-designation occurrences; they normalize to 183 product identities after one repeated current certification occurrence is merged. TBS lifecycle is explicitly computed from official issue/expiry dates because the table has no separate live status flag. Only company, marketed product designation, product type, licence lifecycle and standard designation are retained. Location/contact fields and standard body text are excluded; the registered TBS mark itself is not reproduced.

sources.title: Nigeria Standards Organisation — MANCAP Chemical Sector certified lubricant products
sources.notes: The official 2024-2029 Chemical Sector PDF contains 2,011 consecutively numbered certification rows across 233 pages. A strict lubricant, grease, coolant and technical-fluid scope retains 286 certificate rows and 613 marketed product-designation occurrences, normalized to 608 identities after five exact notation or repeated-row duplicates are merged. Only factual company, product, technical designation, source row/page and list-period evidence is published. Addresses, state, contacts, certification-mark artwork, the PDF itself and non-scope chemicals are excluded.

sources.title: Rwanda Standards Board — S-Mark lubricant products
sources.notes: The public directory exposed 1,843 rows numbered through 1,846 at the 2026-07-21 snapshot; source serials 1,764-1,766 are absent from the page itself. Exact professional product names and lubricant standards RS EAS 159 / RS 234-1 retain nine currently valid products: eight engine oils and one food-grade lubricant. Only company, product/brand designation, licence, standard designation, source status, expiry and source serial are retained. Location, telephone, email, standard body text and certification-mark artwork are excluded.

sources.title: Bureau of Indian Standards — lubricant product-certification licences
sources.notes: The official report schema exposes licence number, manufacturer, Indian Standard, validity/status, certified variety and brand names, including lubricant standards such as IS 13656. Report generation is protected by CAPTCHA; no attempt is made to bypass it. Product rows require an official export/API or written feed agreement before reproducible bulk ingestion.

sources.title: Bharat Petroleum MAK Lubricants product catalog
sources.notes: The current official catalog states that the MAK range contains 400+ grades across automotive and industrial segments. BPCL terms reserve website content and require prior written permission for copying or republication, so individual product rows, descriptions and PDS content are not imported. The observed count is a conservative lower bound, not an exact catalog total.

sources.title: Japan Eco Mark Category 110 Biodegradable Lubricating Oil
sources.owner: Japan Environment Association Eco Mark Office
sources.notes: Live official search on 2026-07-21 reports 124 certified Category 110 entries. The site policy says that reproduction, redistribution and processed/modified use are generally not permitted without authorization, so product rows are not ingested. Direct links are allowed.

sources.title: Ceylon Petroleum Corporation — Ceypetco lubricants catalog
sources.notes: The official catalog of Sri Lanka's state-owned petroleum corporation exposes 23 product lines and current TDS links. Forty-seven factual product-grade/color rows are normalized from the landing page and 22 TDS files. Marketing prose, artwork and document layout are excluded. Two internal TDS conflicts (Scooter SAE and Red-coolant color) are retained as quality flags and are not resolved by guessing.

sources.title: US Defense Logistics Agency Qualified Products Database — FSC 9150
sources.notes: 56 действующих QPL по FSC 9150 содержат 455 товарных вхождений и 431 нормализованный продукт. Сохранены только факты квалификации, QPL/MIL/Federal designation, company/CAGE и GREEN/YELLOW/RED/SAM/Stop Ship; plant-строки без обозначения продукта исключены. Адреса, телефоны, сайты и test reference не переиздаются. Публичные QPL-документы имеют помету Approved for public release; distribution is unlimited. Общий JSONL также содержит строго отобранные профильные сегменты FSC 6850 и FSC 8030; SHA-256 стабильного манифеста фактов 139 qualification pages: 2707d439c2be1b64c92ed4d2cfeeec204515bdcde0e4e13dea756461e8ee0c5e.

sources.title: US DLA Qualified Products Database — FSC 6850 lubricant/lubricity subset
sources.notes: Из 24 действующих QPL класса FSC 6850 включены только шесть спецификаций — QPL-6529, 8188, AS8660, 25017, 29608 и 32490 — где title прямо устанавливает oil, silicone compound, cleaning-lubricating compound, corrosion/lubricity inhibitor или lubricity improver. Получено 25 продуктов из 25 вхождений; чистые cleaners, solvents, desiccants и иная химия исключены. Qualification qualifiers отделены от стандартизированного товарного названия, но сохранены как фактическое доказательство.

sources.title: US DLA Qualified Products Database — FSC 8030 anti-seize and corrosion-preventive subset
sources.notes: Из результатов официального поиска FSC 8030 включены три действующих профильных списка: QPL-907 (высокотемпературный anti-seize), QPL-16173 (холоднонаносимый антикоррозионный состав) и QPL-81309 (водовытесняющий ультратонкоплёночный антикоррозионный состав). Получено 90 товарных вхождений и 80 нормализованных identities; 10 повторов квалификаций слиты без потери government designation. Герметики, цементы, теплоизоляционные/защитные покрытия и неактивный QPL-11796 исключены.

sources.title: Detroit / Daimler Truck DFS Approved Fluids Lists
sources.notes: 11 текущих списков DFS от 09.07.2026 содержат 661 вхождение одобрений и примерно 631 уникальную identity company + product + family. DTNA Legal Terms ограничивают загрузку личным некоммерческим использованием и запрещают повторное использование/изменение содержимого, поэтому товарные строки не импортируются без письменного разрешения.

sources.title: Wolf Lubricants official product catalog
sources.notes: Official daily product sitemaps expose exactly 391 Wolf product identities (ID suffix -01) in 27 locale/host variants at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. Product cards publish category, factual specifications, typicals and TDS/MSDS links. Section 4.2 of the official terms prohibits access to or reuse of a qualitatively or quantitatively substantial part of the database for any purpose, so no individual product rows are imported without prior written consent.

sources.title: Champion Lubricants official product catalog
sources.notes: Official daily product sitemaps expose exactly 431 Champion product identities (ID suffix -02) in 27 locale/host variants at the 2026-07-21 snapshot. Product IDs can share a formulation number with Wolf while remaining separate branded products. Wolf Oil Corporation's database-reuse restriction applies, so no individual Champion rows are imported without prior written consent.

sources.title: Green Choice Philippines — GCP 2008032 Automotive Engine Oil
sources.owner: Philippine Center for Environmental Protection and Sustainable Development, Inc. / National Ecolabelling Programme
sources.notes: The public checker exposes 34 active, 35 expired and seven renewal rows. Exact criterion GCP 2008032 yields three named engine oils, all only in the expired table. Product, holder, licence, criterion and lifecycle facts are retained; the source typo SW-40 remains verbatim and is not guessed into a valid SAE grade.

sources.title: Taiwan MOENV environmental label products — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: All 26,488 API records were reviewed on 2026-07-21. No lubricant, grease, coolant or technical-fluid product was present. Thirty-two keyword hits were digital-copying ink and were rejected as false positives.

sources.title: Bangladesh BSTI CM licence lists — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: Twenty-one regional PDF registers were reviewed. Nine relevant licence-class rows name a holder and a generic standard scope such as internal-combustion-engine crankcase oil, but do not publish marketed brand, grade or product designation. They are not promoted to canonical product rows. Public record verification requires reCAPTCHA and was not automated or bypassed.

sources.title: Malaysia SIRIM certified-products directory — engine-oil review
sources.notes: The official directory describes product, company, scheme, category and scope fields, but the current search flow requires member authentication. No account was created and no access control was bypassed.

sources.title: IndianOil SERVO lubricants and greases
sources.notes: IndianOil officially reports about 1,600 marketed lubricant grades, more than 5,200 formulations and over 1,700 active SKUs. Its terms prohibit copying, reproduction, republication or distribution without prior written permission, so individual SERVO rows are not imported.

sources.title: Singapore Green Labelling Scheme — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: The current scheme publishes 58 standards across nine top-level categories and more than 1,100 active listings, but no lubricant, grease, coolant or automotive-fluid product standard is present. No product rows were ingested.

sources.title: Austrian Ecolabel UZ 14 — lubricants
sources.owner: Austrian Federal Ministry of Agriculture and Forestry, Climate and Environmental Protection, Regions and Water Management (BMLUK)
sources.notes: The current official UZ 14 XLSX lists five licensees; their product cards expose 11 exact lubricants. Only product identity, holder, certificate, country, family assertion and source links are retained. Addresses, contacts, descriptions, images and marks are excluded. BMLUK permits reproduction with attribution except for commercial purposes; commercial republication requires separate permission. Ten rows attach as independent evidence to existing identities and one adds a new canonical product.

sources.title: Thailand Green Label TGL-20 lubricant product review
sources.notes: TGL-20 lubricant criteria remain published, but the June 2026 current list and year-end official list snapshots for 2017-2025 contain no TGL-20 certified product section or lubricant product row. The only TGL-20 mentions are in the criteria index.

sources.title: Eco Choice Aotearoa product directory — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: The current public directory reports 816 certified products, but its published standards and product filters contain no lubricant, grease, coolant or automotive-fluid standard. No product rows were ingested.

sources.title: GECA Australia certified product directory — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: The current directory reports more than 2,000 certified products, but the published standards and directory categories contain no lubricant, grease, coolant or automotive-fluid scope. No product rows were ingested.

sources.title: Hong Kong Green Label Scheme certified products — lubricant scope review
sources.notes: The current certified-products page exposes building-material, mineral, fibre-reinforced home-decor and paint categories, with no lubricant, grease, coolant or automotive-fluid category. No product rows were ingested.

sources.title: Scania genuine engine oils — Middle East Gulf Region
sources.notes: The current regional page names four Scania engine oils. Only product identity and explicitly stated SAE, ACEA, temperature, drain-interval and engine-application facts are retained. LDF-4 has no SAE on this page, so none is inferred. Marketing prose, images, logos and page design are excluded. The same-region legal notice permits Creative Commons 3.0 use with Scania attribution when the contents are not commercialized as such.

sources.title: Malawi Bureau of Standards certified and pre-certified products — lubricant review
sources.notes: All 154 pages and 928 directory entries (596 certified and 332 pre-certified) in the May 2023 official snapshot were reviewed. Oil hits were edible oils, hair oil and release agents; no lubricant, grease, coolant, brake fluid or other professional technical-fluid product row was present.

sources.title: Standards Association of Zimbabwe certified products — lubricant review
sources.notes: The linked Harare, Bulawayo and Mutare certified-product lists were reviewed in full at the snapshot. They contain no marketed lubricant, grease, coolant, brake-fluid or other technical-fluid product row.

sources.title: Mauritius Standards Bureau Mauricert licences — lubricant review
sources.notes: The complete seven-page Mauricert licence list dated 31 December 2025 was reviewed. It contains no marketed lubricant, grease, coolant, brake-fluid or other technical-fluid product row.

sources.title: Namibian Standards Institution certified products — lubricant review
sources.notes: The current one-page product-certification directory was reviewed in full and contains two cement licences only. A separate current management-system directory mentions Vivo Energy's lubricant warehouse, but that is an ISO 9001 organization scope rather than a marketed product record and was not ingested.

sources.title: Brava Lubricants current product-grade catalog
sources.notes: Thirty current official product pages expose 69 distinct product-grade cards across engine, transmission, hydraulic, industrial, turbine and technical fluids. Only factual names, grades, explicitly listed standards/approvals, document links, 94 package occurrences and 93 concrete part-number values are retained. Marketing descriptions, images, logos and page design are excluded. Robots.txt explicitly allows crawling; the site publishes no separate content-republication terms beyond an all-rights-reserved footer, so the normalized output is limited to attributed non-expressive facts. One nonstandard ACEA A4/B4 claim is retained verbatim and flagged; two placeholder part numbers and one vague 'and more' statement are excluded from strict data. Part number BRA-119-D is assigned by the source to both Ignis 5W-20 and Aurum 5W-20; both assignments remain separate and flagged.

sources.title: Mack Genuine Lubricants, Coolants and Technical Fluids
sources.notes: Current official Mack SDS catalog and product overview expose 15 product-grade rows and 32 package/part-number offers across engine oils, gear and transmission fluids, grease, hydraulic oil and coolants. Six additional regional part-number variants from six hashed official product sheets produce 38 unique official part numbers. Engine-oil EOS/API mappings come from the December 2023 Mack body-builder manual; mDRIVE standards and VCS2 POAT chemistry come from the current official overview. Source-reported mDRIVE part numbers retain unusual embedded spaces and are flagged. The printed standard 37319 is retained verbatim but flagged and excluded from asserted equivalence until confirmed. Two catalog SDS links point to differently named products and are retained only as source anomalies, not technical evidence. Only attributed non-expressive facts are published; marketing prose, images and page design are excluded.

sources.title: Mack Service Bulletin 175-61-08 Approved Oils
sources.notes: Official 29-page bulletin dated April 2014. The parser retains 806 approval occurrences, 805 section-level product-grade rows and 803 normalized supplier-product-grade identities across EO-O Premium Plus, EO-N Premium Plus, mDRIVE, TO-A Plus, GO-J and GO-J Plus. One exact duplicate source row and two cross-section/grade-notation identities are merged with all page/row evidence preserved. Every row is historical_approval with current status explicitly unverified; it is not current-market or current-approval evidence. Only attributed non-expressive table facts are published.

sources.title: Valvoline Product Catalogue Europe — Cummins-hosted April 2022 edition
sources.notes: Official Cummins-hosted 11-page April 2022 European Valvoline catalog. Spatial parsing preserves 166 product cards, 510 exact package/article assignments and 502 unique article numbers across engine, driveline, coolant, grease, hydraulic, compressor, turbine and industrial families. Eight article numbers are printed against more than one product; all assignments are retained and flagged rather than treated as unique identities. Every row is a dated historical catalog observation with current status explicitly unverified. Only attributed non-expressive facts are published; marketing prose, images and design are excluded.

sources.title: Cummins current registered oil lists in QuickServe Online
sources.notes: Cummins documents the current oil-registration lists under QuickServe Online > Service > Service Tools, but the product tables require an authenticated Limited Owners Plan or other authorized account. No authentication was bypassed and no current registry product row is claimed. The public 2022 corporate catalog is tracked separately and must not be presented as the current Cummins registration list.

sources.title: CPC Taiwan current lubricant, grease and technical-fluid product sheets
sources.notes: Seven current official directory categories expose 224 unique CPC manufacturer product codes and product-sheet cards. Derived output retains product identity, code, update date, technical grades and standards, 478 structured package facts, evidence URLs and hashes. Descriptive prose, images and layout are excluded. Twenty-seven cards contain multi-grade ISO VG tables that cannot be attributed to the exact listing safely; those products remain present without a guessed ISO VG and carry explicit quality flags. The ingestion uses normal certificate verification with the official TWCA intermediate pinned by SHA-256; no TLS verification bypass is used.

sources.title: Volvo Group WebSDS public SDS change archive
sources.owner: Volvo Group / Volvo Cars / Renault Trucks
sources.notes: Fifty current archive documents (49 PDF and one XLSX) contain 833 table rows; 537 lubricant, coolant and technical-fluid occurrences normalize conservatively to 144 product/part identities and 394 unique part numbers. Generic names remain part-number-specific. An SDS change observation proves an official record existed or changed on the stated date, not current market availability. Full SDS text, hazards, images and layout are not republished.

sources.title: Repsol Lubricants public product catalog
sources.notes: Official pages expose product cards and technical documents, but Repsol's legal notice restricts reproduction, copying, distribution and transformation without authorization or a legal exception. No product rows are imported; request a licensed feed or written permission.

sources.title: Mexico CONUEE Buscador de Productos Certificados — lubricant-scope review
sources.owner: Comisión Nacional para el Uso Eficiente de la Energía / Gobierno de México
sources.notes: The March 2026 downloadable CSV contains 7,835 energy-efficiency certified-product rows. A strict lubricant/coolant/technical-fluid scope review found zero relevant product rows, so this source is retained as a documented zero-coverage result rather than padded into the catalog.

sources.title: Parker-Denison current hydraulic-fluid ratings
